pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.4.2 to 3.3.1 to support Java 21 and Jakarta EE namespace.
Update the target Java version property from 11 to 21.
Replace javax.validation with jakarta.validation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
Update Spring Cloud version to 2023.0.3 to align with Spring Boot 3.3.x.
Update Spring Cloud Starter version to 4.1.3 for compatibility with the new Spring Cloud release train.
Upgrade Netflix Eureka Client to 4.1.3 to support Spring Cloud 2023.x.
Upgrade Spring Kafka to 3.2.2 to support Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.
Upgrade JAXB to 4.0.5 to use the Jakarta XML Binding API compatible with Java 21.
Upgrade Liquibase to 4.28.0 to ensure compatibility with newer database drivers and Java 21.
Upgrade SpringDoc OpenAPI to 1.8.0 to support Jakarta EE namespaces.
Add Spring Cloud Netflix Zuul starter dependency for API gateway functionality.
Add Spring Cloud Config Client dependency to enable configuration retrieval from a config server.
Add Mantis Runtime dependency for reactive stream processing capabilities.
Explicitly add Jackson Databind dependency to manage JSON serialization version.
Add MockNeat dependency for generating random test data.
Upgrade Ehcache to 3.10.8 for bug fixes and performance improvements.
Standardize Spring Boot starter versions to use the parent version property instead of hardcoded or incorrect properties.
Bump the project artifact version to 2.8.108.

.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Update the CI workflow to use JDK 17 instead of JDK 1.8 to align with the migration target.
Modernize GitHub Actions dependencies to their latest major versions (v4) for better security and features.
Switch the Java distribution in CI from the default to Zulu for consistent runtime behavior.
Remove the explicit Maven cache step, likely relying on default runner caching or deeming it unnecessary.
Restrict CI triggers to pull requests only, removing the push trigger on master.
Update the Maven build command to explicitly run the package phase before install.

README.md.general_idea: Update the README badge to reflect the new GitHub Actions workflow name and URL.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced old 'Java CI with Maven' badge URL with new 'CI - Create Release and Publish' badge URL.

settings.xml.general_idea: Add Maven Central repository to the GitHub profile to ensure standard dependencies can be resolved.
Update the GitHub Packages repository URL to point to a specific scope or organization path.
Replace hardcoded GitHub personal access token with an environment variable reference for security.
Add a missing newline at the end of the settings.xml file to comply with POSIX standards.
